prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Renault Cléon-Fonte 807 (1.3L, 8-valve, inline-4)** with forged internals: Wiseco 87.5mm forged pistons (9.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from **JP3 Performance** to handle 250+ hp. Pair with a **Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger** (0.63 A/R turbine housing) and a **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate** for precise boost control at 1.2 bar (17.5 psi).

Custom **Mocal 13-row oil cooler** with AN-10 braided lines and a **Setrab 50-row transmission cooler** to manage heat under sustained high-RPM track use. Replace the stock **Solex 32 PAIA carburetor** with a **Weber 45 DCOE sidedraft setup** (45mm throttle bodies) tuned by **Dyno Developments UK**, paired with a **Megajolt Lite Jr. ignition system** for precise timing control.

Full **polyurethane bushings** from **SuperPro** (part #SPF0114K) for the rear trailing arms and **Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (22mm)** to eliminate body roll. Suspension overhaul with **Ohlins DFV Road & Track coilovers (custom valved for the R8 Gordini’s 720kg weight)** and **Eibach Pro-Kit springs** (25% stiffer than stock) for a 30mm drop. Braking upgrade to **Brembo 4-piston calipers (from a Renault 5 Turbo)** with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **DBA 5000 Series rotors (280mm front, 240mm rear)** for fade-resistant stopping power.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1-style widebody kit** (custom-fabricated for the R8 Gordini’s 2,270mm wheelbase) with **carbon fiber fender flares** and **aluminum overfenders** to fit **15x8 ET0 BBS RS wheels** (gold centers) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (195/50 R15)**. Front splitter and rear diffuser from **Aeroflow Dynamics** in raw carbon fiber, with a **custom aluminum rear wing** (inspired by the Alpine A110) mounted on **Rear Wing Co. adjustable pedestals**.

Full **Gordini Blue (Bleu Gordini 418)** respray with **PPG D8188 basecoat** and **PPG DC2000 clearcoat**, including **custom gold leaf pinstriping** (hand-applied by **Signarama UK**) on the beltline and wheel arches. **Hella Rallye 1000 headlights** with **Cibie Oscar LED bulbs** and **custom Hella fog lights** (integrated into the front bumper) for period-correct rally aesthetics.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with **Recaro SRD bucket seats** (retrimmed in **Bridge of Weir leather with Alcantara centers**) and **Schroth 6-point harnesses**. **Momo Prototipo steering wheel** (350mm, suede) on a **NRG quick-release hub**, with a **custom aluminum dashboard** (CNC-milled by **DashKits UK**) housing **Defi Advance BF gauges** (oil pressure, boost, and wideband AFR). **Sound deadening removed** and replaced with **Dynamat Xtreme** only on the firewall for weight savings.
